title: Bankruptcy
description: Practice your understanding of bankruptcy, factors that cause it, and chapters 7 and 13 of bankruptcy.

assessment_items.question_content:
Bankruptcy is a legal process where people cannot pay their debts and need help to manage them. There are several factors that could lead to bankruptcy.

**Which event might cause someone to file for bankruptcy?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: getting a promotion
divorce
going on vacation

assessment_items.question_content:
Bankruptcy is a legal process where people cannot pay their debts and need help to manage them. There are several factors that could lead to bankruptcy.

**Which event might cause someone to file for bankruptcy?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: getting a promotion
experiencing a job loss
graduating from college

assessment_items.question_content:
Bankruptcy is a legal process where people cannot pay their debts and need help to manage them. There are several factors that could lead to bankruptcy.

**Which of the following factors could lead to bankruptcy?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: winning a lottery
medical expenses
investing into stocks

assessment_items.question_content:
Mismanaging money can lead to serious financial problems.

**How can money mismanagement lead to bankruptcy?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: by saving too much money
by not borrowing any money
by borrowing too much money and not being able to pay it back
by investing in the stock market

assessment_items.question_content:
Mismanaging money can lead to serious financial problems.

**What are some consequences of poor credit management and bankruptcy?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: You can get better interest rates on loans.
Your credit score will always stay the same.
You may find it difficult to get a job or rent an apartment.
You will never be able to get a loan again.

assessment_items.question_content:
Mismanaging money and bankruptcy can lead to serious financial problems and affect your credit score.

**How can bankruptcy affect your credit score?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: it will increase your credit score
it will have no impact on your credit score
it will decrease your credit score
it will change your credit score to a random number

assessment_items.question_content:
Bankruptcy is a legal process that allows people to wipe away some or all of their debt. *Chapter 7* is one of the most common ways of declaring bankruptcy.

**What might someone filing for *Chapter 7* bankruptcy have to do? **

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: sell some of their property to pay off their debt
surrender all credit cards
make a repayment plan
watch a video about debt

assessment_items.question_content:
Bankruptcy is a legal process that allows people to wipe away some or all of their debt. *Chapter 7* is one of the most common ways of declaring bankruptcy.

**If someone files for *Chapter 7* bankruptcy, what happens to their debts? **

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: They have to pay all their debts in full.
Their debts are reduced, but not eliminated.
Most of their debts are eliminated.
Their debts are transferred to someone else.

assessment_items.question_content:
Bankruptcy is a legal process that allows people to wipe away some or all of their debt. *Chapter 7* is one of the most common ways of declaring bankruptcy.

**Which of the following types of debt is generally NOT dischargeable in a *Chapter 7* bankruptcy?**


[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: credit card debt
medical bills
student loans
personal loans

assessment_items.question_content:
Bankruptcy is a legal process that helps people who cannot pay their debts. One type of bankruptcy is called *Chapter 13*.

**What might someone filing for *Chapter 13* bankruptcy have to do? **

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: sell some of their property to pay off their debt
go to counseling
make a repayment plan
serve jail time

assessment_items.question_content:
Bankruptcy is a legal process that helps people who cannot pay their debts. One type of bankruptcy is called *Chapter 13*.

**Who is *Chapter 13* bankruptcy best suited for? **

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: people who can't afford to pay anything back to their creditors
people who have a regular income and are able to make monthly payments
people who want to discharge their debts immediately
people who want to keep all of their property but don't have a regular income

assessment_items.question_content:
Bankruptcy is a legal process that helps people who cannot pay their debts. One type of bankruptcy is called *Chapter 13*.

**What happens after you complete your *Chapter 13* repayment plan? **

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: you have to start a new repayment plan for the remaining debt
you still owe all of your original debts
some or all of your remaining debts are eliminated
you have to file for a different type of bankruptcy
